about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: From the streets of Cali to Tully Road
about.content: We're a Colombian family in San José. We missed the cholados from the street corners of Cali, so we started making them ourselves. We brought our family recipes and found the freshest fruit we could.
about.content2: Everything is made by hand: guanábana, lulo and passion fruit ice cream, obleas with arequipe, strawberries and cream. The name is a play on words: Rancho + cholados. This is our little ranch and here the cholado is king.
about.cta: We're on Tully Road, every day noon to 10.
about.value1Desc: Everything is made to order with our family recipes.
about.value3Desc: Guanábana, lulo, passion fruit, arequipe and more.

footer.tagline: A refreshing treat, just the way you crave it

featured.title: Most Popular
featured.subtitle: Straight from Cali to your table 🇨🇴

location.title: Where We Are
location.subtitle: From Cali to San José — Tully Road

origin.headline: From the streets of Cali to your neighborhood
origin.description: We brought the authentic flavors of Valle del Cauca — the cholados, the fresh fruit, the family recipes — all the way to San José.

process.title: How We Make It
process.subtitle: Our process
process.desc1: We pick the ripest tropical fruit — mango, lulo, guanábana, passion fruit — and cut it fresh every day.
process.desc2: Every cholado, every scoop, every oblea is prepared by hand using our family's original recipes from Cali.
process.desc3: Made to order, the way you like it. With all the toppings, all the love, and zero shortcuts.

cholado.title: Try the Cholado with Ice Cream 🔥

fresas.title: Fresas con Crema Season 🍓
fresas.desc: Fresh strawberries with our homemade sweet cream and condensed milk. A Rancholados classic.

popup.title: Cholado with Ice Cream
popup.desc: Our signature creation — guanábana, lulo, passion fruit, watermelon, kiwi, mango, apple and homemade ice cream on top. The one everyone talks about.
